if.test: searchKeyword != null and searchKeyword != '' and searchColumn != null and searchColumn != ''

mapper.select:
SELECT o.order_id AS orderId , i.line_no AS lineNo , o.order_no AS orderNo , i.item_order_no AS itemOrderNo , o.combined_ship_no AS combinedShipNo , o.mall_cd AS mallCd , m.mall_nm AS mallNm , o.store_cd AS storeCd , s.store_nm AS storeNm , TO_CHAR(o.order_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS orderDt , TO_CHAR(o.regist_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS registDt , o.order_process_status AS orderProcessStatus , o.sales_type_cd AS salesTypeCd , o.order_type_cd AS orderTypeCd , i.product_cd AS productCd , i.product_nm AS productNm , i.line_qty AS lineQty , i.line_amount AS lineAmount , i.line_discount_amount AS lineDiscountAmount , i.line_payload::text AS linePayload , (o.order_info->>'receiverNm') AS receiverNm , (o.order_info->>'receiverTel') AS receiverTel , (o.order_info->>'receiverMobile') AS receiverMobile , (o.order_info->>'receiverAddr') AS receiverAddr , (o.order_info->>'receiverAddr2') AS receiverAddr2 , (o.order_info->>'receiverZip') AS receiverZip , TO_CHAR(o.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt , o.created_by AS createdBy FROM om_order_m o JOIN om_order_item_m i ON i.order_id = o.order_id AND i.regist_dt = o.regist_dt LEFT JOIN om_mall_m m ON m.mall_cd = o.mall_cd LEFT JOIN om_mall_store_m s ON s.mall_cd = o.mall_cd AND s.corporation_cd = o.corporation_cd AND s.store_cd = o.store_cd
ORDER BY o.combined_ship_no, o.order_no, o.order_id DESC, o.regist_dt DESC, i.line_no ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT o.order_id AS orderId , i.line_no AS lineNo , o.order_no AS orderNo , o.combined_ship_no AS combinedShipNo , o.store_cd AS storeCd , s.store_nm AS storeNm , TO_CHAR(o.order_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS orderDt , TO_CHAR(o.regist_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS registDt , i.product_cd AS productCd , i.product_nm AS productNm , i.line_qty AS lineQty , i.line_amount AS lineAmount , (o.order_info->>'receiverNm') AS receiverNm FROM om_order_m o JOIN om_order_item_m i ON i.order_id = o.order_id AND i.regist_dt = o.regist_dt LEFT JOIN om_mall_store_m s ON s.mall_cd = o.mall_cd AND s.corporation_cd = o.corporation_cd AND s.store_cd = o.store_cd
ORDER BY o.combined_ship_no, o.order_no, o.order_id DESC, o.regist_dt DESC, i.line_no ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT o.order_id AS orderId , i.line_no AS lineNo , o.order_no AS orderNo , i.item_order_no AS itemOrderNo , o.combined_ship_no AS combinedShipNo , o.mall_cd AS mallCd , m.mall_nm AS mallNm , o.store_cd AS storeCd , s.store_nm AS storeNm , TO_CHAR(o.order_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS orderDt , TO_CHAR(o.regist_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS registDt , o.order_process_status AS orderProcessStatus , o.sales_type_cd AS salesTypeCd , o.order_type_cd AS orderTypeCd , i.product_cd AS productCd , i.product_nm AS productNm , i.line_qty AS lineQty , i.line_amount AS lineAmount , i.line_discount_amount AS lineDiscountAmount , i.line_payload::text AS linePayload , (o.order_info->>'receiverNm') AS receiverNm , (o.order_info->>'receiverTel') AS receiverTel , (o.order_info->>'receiverMobile') AS receiverMobile , (o.order_info->>'receiverAddr') AS receiverAddr , (o.order_info->>'receiverAddr2') AS receiverAddr2 , (o.order_info->>'receiverZip') AS receiverZip , TO_CHAR(o.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt , o.created_by AS createdBy FROM om_order_m o JOIN om_order_item_m i ON i.order_id = o.order_id AND i.regist_dt = o.regist_dt LEFT JOIN om_mall_m m ON m.mall_cd = o.mall_cd LEFT JOIN om_mall_store_m s ON s.mall_cd = o.mall_cd AND s.corporation_cd = o.corporation_cd AND s.store_cd = o.store_cd
ORDER BY o.combined_ship_no, o.order_no, o.order_id DESC, o.regist_dt DESC, i.line_no ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM om_order_m o JOIN om_order_item_m i ON i.order_id = o.order_id AND i.regist_dt = o.regist_dt LEFT JOIN om_mall_store_m s ON s.mall_cd = o.mall_cd AND s.corporation_cd = o.corporation_cd AND s.store_cd = o.store_cd

SELECT o.order_process_status AS orderProcessStatus , COUNT(*) AS count FROM om_order_m o JOIN om_order_item_m i ON i.order_id = o.order_id AND i.regist_dt = o.regist_dt LEFT JOIN om_mall_store_m s ON s.mall_cd = o.mall_cd AND s.corporation_cd = o.corporation_cd AND s.store_cd = o.store_cd
GROUP BY o.order_process_status

SELECT order_id AS orderId , TO_CHAR(regist_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS registDt , corporation_cd AS corporationCd , mall_cd AS mallCd , store_cd AS storeCd , TO_CHAR(order_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS orderDt , order_no AS orderNo , combined_ship_no AS combinedShipNo , sales_type_cd AS salesTypeCd , order_process_status AS orderProcessStatus , order_type_cd AS orderTypeCd , (order_info->>'receiverNm') AS receiverNm , (order_info->>'receiverTel') AS receiverTel , (order_info->>'receiverMobile') AS receiverMobile , (order_info->>'receiverAddr') AS receiverAddr , (order_info->>'receiverAddr2') AS receiverAddr2 , (order_info->>'receiverZip') AS receiverZip , (order_info->>'ordererNm') AS ordererNm , (order_info->>'ordererUserId') AS ordererUserId , (order_info->>'ordererTel') AS ordererTel , (order_info->>'ordererMobile') AS ordererMobile , (order_info->>'memo') AS memo , (NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(order_info->>'deliveryFee', '')), '')::numeric) AS deliveryFee , (order_info->>'paymentMethodCd') AS paymentMethodCd , order_info::text AS orderInfo , TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt , TO_CHAR(updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt , created_by AS createdBy , updated_by AS updatedBy FROM om_order_m WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND regist_dt = (#{registDt}::date) AND corporation_cd = #{corporationCd}
AND store_cd = #{storeCd}
SELECT nextval('seq_combined_ship_no') AS val FROM generate_series(1, #{count})
SELECT nextval('seq_order_id')
SELECT nextval('seq_order_id') FROM generate_series(1, #{count}) AS s(i)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO om_order_m ( order_id, corporation_cd, mall_cd, store_cd, order_dt, regist_dt, order_no, combined_ship_no, sales_type_cd, order_process_status, order_type_cd, order_info, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES
(#{m.orderId}, #{m.corporationCd}, #{m.mallCd}, #{m.storeCd}, (#{m.orderDt}::date), (#{m.registDt}::date), #{m.orderNo}, NULL, #{m.salesTypeCd}, 'ORDER_RECEIVED', COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(#{m.orderTypeCd}), ''), 'NORMAL'), COALESCE(#{m.orderInfo}::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{m.createdBy}, #{m.updatedBy})

INSERT INTO om_order_item_m ( order_id, regist_dt, line_no, item_order_no, product_cd, product_nm, line_qty, line_amount, line_discount_amount, line_payload, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES
(#{i.orderId}, (#{i.registDt}::date), #{i.lineNo}, #{i.itemOrderNo}, #{i.productCd}, #{i.productNm}, #{i.lineQty}, #{i.lineAmount}, COALESCE(#{i.lineDiscountAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{i.linePayload}::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb), false, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{i.createdBy}, #{i.updatedBy})
INSERT INTO om_order_status_log (order_id, regist_dt, status_kind, status_value, status_by) VALUES (#{orderId}, (#{registDt})::date, #{statusKind}, #{statusValue}, #{statusBy})

INSERT INTO om_order_status_log (order_id, regist_dt, status_kind, status_value, status_by) VALUES
(#{k.orderId}, (#{k.registDt})::date, #{statusKind}, #{statusValue}, #{statusBy})
mapper.select: SELECT l.id AS id , l.order_id AS orderId , TO_CHAR(l.regist_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS registDt , l.status_kind AS statusKind , l.status_value AS statusValue , TO_CHAR(l.status_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS statusDt , l.status_by AS statusBy , u.user_nm AS statusByNm , TO_CHAR(l.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM om_order_status_log l LEFT JOIN om_user_m u ON u.user_id = l.status_by WHERE l.order_id = #{orderId} AND l.regist_dt = (#{registDt})::date ORDER BY l.status_dt ASC

SELECT DISTINCT o.order_no FROM om_order_m o WHERE o.regist_dt = (#{registDt})::date AND o.corporation_cd = #{corporationCd} AND o.sales_type_cd = #{salesTypeCd} AND (o.mall_cd, o.store_cd, o.order_no) IN
(#{t.mallCd}, #{t.storeCd}, #{t.orderNo})
